privileged_info_for_vlm: Task requires fixing employee data in AttendHRM. Branch fixes: EMP 108 (Reid Ryan), 120 (Jessica Owens), and 148 (Jack West) must be set to London. EMP 135 (Daisy Brooks) must be set to Norwich. Department fixes: EMP 113 (Miller Russell) must be set to Accounts. EMP 137 (Ryan Murphy) must be set to Information Technology. New hires: 5 employees (EMP 5001-5005) must be imported from q4_new_hires.csv on the Desktop. Pass threshold is 70/100.
